summary: Iteration 129: DialogueEditor bug fix verified. Backend: 9/9 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements verified. The fix correctly uses AI-assigned voice_map (Rachel, Lily, Charlotte, Brian, etc.) instead of hardcoded fallback names (Arnold, Bella, Gigi). Alert banner shows '31 cena(s) sem diálogos dublados' with 'Gerar Diálogos' button. Dubbed tab is active by default.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend dialogues.py (lines 192-246): Correctly prioritizes manual_voices > ai_voice_map > fallback for character voice assignment
Backend dialogues.py (lines 248-259): Returns scenes_needing_dubbed count and has_voice_map flag
Frontend DialogueEditor.jsx (lines 98-109): getTextField() no longer falls back to narration in dubbed mode - only returns dubbed_text or dialogue with character format
Frontend DialogueEditor.jsx (lines 254-275): Alert banner shows when needsDubbedGen > 0 with 'Gerar Diálogos' button
seed_data_creation: Used existing project d27afb0e79ff (ADÃO E EVA - BIBLIZOO 2 - 17 characters, 31 scenes)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 129 complete. DialogueEditor bug fix verified. Project d27afb0e79ff has 17 characters with AI-assigned voices from voice_map. 31 scenes need dubbed dialogues. The Dubbed tab is active by default in Step 4 (DIÁLOGOS). Voice assignments visible: Adão→Rachel, Eva→Lily, A Serpente→Charlotte, Leão Majestoso→Brian, etc. The 'Gerar Diálogos' button triggers dialogue generation for all scenes (DO NOT click in tests - takes too long).
